message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam sequenceMessageStyle endArrow

package "BL1 common code" {
  [bl1_main]
  [bl_common]
}

package "arm platform code" {
  [fvp_bl1_setup]
  [arm_bl1_setup]
  [arm_io_storage]
}

package "platform common code" {
  [plat_bl1_common]
  [fconf]
}

note right of bl1_main
  load and auth image from fip
  with info from plat_io_policy
end note

note right of fconf
  create and populate an
  image_desc_t for FW_CONFIG
end note

note right of fconf
  use statically defined policies in bl1
end note

note right of fconf
  get tb_fw_config_dtb from image_info
end note

note right of fconf
  set ep_info.args.arg0 of BL2_IMAGE_DESC
  to FW_CONFIG base address
end note

note right of arm_bl1_setup
  register and setup fip
end note

note right of fconf
  load & auth, prepare and jump to BL2
end note

bl1_main -> fvp_bl1_setup : bl1_platform_setup()
fvp_bl1_setup -> arm_bl1_setup : arm_bl1_platform_setup()
arm_bl1_setup -> arm_io_storage : plat_arm_io_setup()
arm_bl1_setup -> fconf : fconf_load_config()
fconf -> fconf : create and populate an image_desc_t for FW_CONFIG
fconf -> bl1_main : load_auth_image(FW_CONFIG_ID, &image_info)
bl1_main -> fconf : FCONF_GET_PROPERTY(arm, arm_io_policies, tb_fw_cfg)
fconf -> fconf : use statically defined policies in bl1
fconf -> fconf : get tb_fw_config_dtb from image_info
plat_bl1_common -> fconf : bl1_plat_get_image_desc(BL2_IMAGE_ID)
fconf -> plat_bl1_common : BL2_IMAGE_DESC
plat_bl1_common -> fconf : set ep_info.args.arg0 of BL2_IMAGE_DESC to FW_CONFIG base address
fconf -> fvp_bl1_setup : load & auth, prepare and jump to BL2

@enduml
